name: Crystal Focus
rulesText:
Off-Hand Equipment — Focus
Focus • Crystal • Arcane
Crystal Channeling: Once per combat, when you resolve an Arcana spell that deals damage, add +1 damage.

traits: Crystal Channeling: Once per combat, when you resolve an Arcana spell that deals damage, add +1 damage.

source.notes: The once-per-combat trait should use the established equipment-use tracking method.
